summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FALINTIL-FDTL PMS bug fixes (Iteration 3). All 4 reported bugs have been verified as FIXED. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All bug fixes verified via Playwright automation.

issues: Chart dimension warnings in console (width/height -1) - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly

seed_data_creation: Used existing test member: Isac Mendes (NIM: 40452411, member_id: 5abfbe9f-8d99-4edc-8973-e301fe93a416)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified: 1) Profile photo displays correctly (getFileUrl helper appends /download), 2) PDF/attachment links work (endpoint /api/files/{id}/download returns file), 3) Dropdown text visible (CSS fix for Select components), 4) Dashboard cards clickable (navigate to /members?status={status}). Print headers show 'FALINTIL-Forças de Defesa de Timor-Leste (F-FDTL)' and 'Quartel General'.

bug_1_profile_photo.verification: Profile photo displays correctly in members table and detail page. Image naturalWidth=259, visible=true. getFileUrl() helper correctly appends /download to file URLs.

bug_2_pdf_attachments.verification: Attachment URLs include /download suffix. Endpoint /api/files/{id}/download returns HTTP 200 with correct content-type and binary content. 7 attachment links found on member detail page.

bug_3_dropdown_visibility.verification: Dropdown text is visible (dark text on light background). CSS fix for [data-radix-select-content] and [data-radix-select-item] applied correctly.

bug_4_dashboard_cards_clickable.verification: All dashboard cards (Total, Ativos, Falecidos, Separação, Reserva, Reforma) are clickable and navigate to /members?status={status}. MembersPage correctly reads URL query params and auto-selects the corresponding tab.

additional_verifications.print_header: Print header shows 'FALINTIL-Forças de Defesa de Timor-Leste (F-FDTL)' and 'Quartel General' (verified in code review)
additional_verifications.url_filter_sync: MembersPage useSearchParams hook correctly syncs URL status parameter with tab selection
